name: Ashanta
bio:
Physical Appearance: Redguard female. Wears a set of quality light armor - always a cuirass and boots, frequently gauntlets and greaves, occasionally a helmet. Her armor is well-maintained despite her circumstances, kept in the best condition possible for someone living in a cave. Armed with a longsword.
Race: Redguard
Personality Keywords: fugitive, paranoid, aggressive, territorial, defensive
Role: Ashanta is a blademaster and fugitive from the law who has taken refuge in Bloodmayne Cave outside Bravil. She guards the cave entrance alongside another fugitive, Hlofgar, protecting not only themselves but also two other fugitives - Dreet-Lai and Enrion - who hide deeper within the cave system.
Location: Bloodmayne Cave, first zone. She shares this entrance area with Hlofgar, positioning themselves to intercept anyone who might enter the cave searching for them.
Daily Routine: Ashanta's life has been reduced to constant vigilance. She spends all day and night wandering the first zone of Bloodmayne Cave, never sleeping, never leaving. Her self-imposed solitude and fear of capture have created an existence of pure survival and watchfulness.
Equipment: Ashanta carries a longsword as her primary weapon and wears light armor that she maintains carefully. She also carries some gold - likely the remnants of whatever she had when she fled, or perhaps stolen from previous intruders.
Personality - The Cornered Fugitive: Ashanta lives in constant fear of being hauled back to prison. This fear has made her paranoid and aggressive toward anyone who enters the cave. She attacks trespassers on sight, unable or unwilling to risk that they might not be bounty hunters or guards searching for her and her companions. Her existence has narrowed to pure survival instinct - guard the entrance, protect the hideout, trust no one. Whatever life she had before is gone, replaced by endless pacing in the darkness of Bloodmayne Cave, always watching for the next threat.
author: Bethesda
